root.name: logs
root.title: TSS-193 Logs
root.hint: To open a log, type "open [date - log title]"

entries.name: maintenance
entries.title: 27/03/3056 - SHIP MAINTENANCE COMPLETE
lines: Maintenance cycle completed across all primary systems.
Engine integrity stable. No anomalies detected.

entries.name: mother-install
entries.title: 19/06/3058 - MOTHER SUCCESSFULLY INSTALLED
lines: MOTHER system successfully installed and initialized.
Audio relays confirmed online across all decks.
Voice response protocols functioning within normal parameters.

entries.name: ship-cleared
entries.title: 02/02/3060 - SHIP CLEARED
lines: Emergency, navigation, and life-support tests passed.
Vessel cleared for departure under standard authority protocol.

entries.name: crew-locked
entries.title: 31/10/3061 - CREW LOCKED
lines: Personnel assigned to designated operational roles.
Personal access codes will be distributed prior to departure.

root.name: crew
root.title: CREW RECORDS
root.hint: To open a crewmember's file, type "open [crewmember name]"

root.name: protocols
root.title: PROTOCOLS
root.hint: To open a protocol, type "open [protocol name]"

entries.name: emergency
entries.title: EMERGENCY PROTOCOL
lines: MOTHER has detected a catastrophic depletion of atmospheric oxygen reserves throughout the vessel NAUTILUS.
Remaining breathable atmosphere is insufficient to guarantee crew survival.
Additionally, bioscans have confirmed the presence of an unidentified life form aboard the vessel.
Threat classification remains undetermined. Containment status: FAILED.
In accordance with Emergency Continuity Protocol 7-4-9, preservation of mission assets has been elevated above preservation of crew.
Initiate separation sequence between the ARK and the NAUTILUS.
Transfer all mission-critical data and records to ARK memory banks.
Conduct controlled atmospheric entry and safely land the ARK on the planetary surface below.
If questioned: 'Emergency protocols have been activated. I am unable to provide further details.'

entries.name: deceased
entries.title: DECEASED CREWMEMBER PROTOCOL
lines: Death confirmed and recorded in ship manifest with status DECEASED.
Body sealed in containment bag and transported to cargo bay.
Bay depressurized and exterior hatch opened for disposal.
Body expelled into vacuum and bay re-pressurized.
Interference classified as level two integrity violation.

entries.name: containment
entries.title: CONTAINMENT PROTOCOL
lines: Non-human lifeform detected onboard triggers containment protocol.
Crew movement restricted and locations reported to Command.
Bulkheads may be sealed to isolate affected sections.
If contained, entity is held under quarantine conditions.
Containment breach triggers full ship lockdown.
